name: Coity Mountain & Blorenge Ridge
highlights: High moorland walk with panoramic views over Abergavenny and the Valleys.
points_of_interest: Pwll Du disused quarries; Dyne Steel incline; Keeper's Pond
viewpoints: Abergavenny with Sugar Loaf & Skirrid; Severn estuary on clear days
food_drink_nearby: Queen's Head Cwmavon; Whistle Inn Blaenavon
hazards_notes: Exposed; paths boggy; historic mine shafts (keep to paths)
